resolves: DOM-04 business label (backend_app_root → Platform Infrastructure and Data)
PZ-001 zone label in tier1_narrative focus block
does_not_resolve: 17-domain count cards (Semantic Domains / Structurally Backed / Semantic-Only)
Semantic domain topology SVG with curated 17-node layout
5/17 structural backing annotation in tier1_evidence and tier2_diagnostic

full_canonical_invocation: CANNOT BE DETERMINED — semantic_topology_model.json and semantic_topology_layout.json required for --semantic-topology-dir do not exist in repository
blocked_reason: semantic_topology_model.json and semantic_topology_layout.json are absent from all blueedge paths in the repository. These files are required by _load_semantic_topology() to populate _SEMANTIC_TOPOLOGY_MODEL and _SEMANTIC_TOPOLOGY_LAYOUT globals. Without them: (1) _build_semantic_report_context() returns fallback with total_semantic_domains=0, structurally_backed_domains=0; (2) count cards show structural counts (13 Domains, 35 Components) not semantic counts (17 Semantic Domains, 5 Backed, 12 Semantic-Only); (3) _render_topology_section() cannot route to _render_semantic_topology_svg(); (4) hardcoded 17-domain SVG does not fire because domain_count=13 with vault canonical_topology.json.
additional_finding_run_id: The canonical decision_surface was generated without --run-id (nav links show run_01_authoritative_generated = module default). Full canonical parity also requires omitting --run-id flag.
additional_finding_vault_run_field: Canonical tier2 shows run_blueedge_productized_01 in t2-field-value (from vault_index.json). This field reads from the app vault_index.json, not from _ACTIVE_VAULT_RUN_ID. Cannot be controlled via CLI flag.
note_on_renderer_support: Renderer fully supports --crosswalk-path and --semantic-topology-dir flags. The blockage is DATA (missing semantic topology model files), not a renderer capability gap.
